heading: Relationship of trade agreements to United States law
label: 2504 Relationship of trade agreements to United States law

children.heading: United States statutes to prevail in conflict
children.label: a United States statutes to prevail in conflict
children.text: No provision of any trade agreement approved by the Congress under , nor the application of any such provision to any person or circumstance, which is in conflict with any statute of the United States shall be given effect under the laws of the United States.section 2503(a) of this title

children.heading: Implementing regulations
children.label: b Implementing regulations
children.text: Regulations necessary or appropriate to carry out actions proposed in any statement of proposed administrative action submitted to the Congress under to implement each agreement approved under shall be issued within 1 year after the date of the entry into force of such agreement with respect to the United States.section 2112 of this titlesection 2503(a) of this title

children.heading: Changes in statutes to implement a requirement, amendment, or recommendation
children.label: c Changes in statutes to implement a requirement, amendment, or recommendation

children.heading: Presidential determination
children.label: 1 Presidential determination
children.text: Whenever the President determines that it is necessary or appropriate to amend, repeal, or enact a statute of the United States in order to implement any requirement of, amendment to, or recommendation under such an agreement, he shall submit to the Congress a draft of a bill to accomplish the amendment, repeal, or enactment and a statement of any administrative action proposed to implement the requirement, amendment, or recommendation. Not less than 30 days before submitting such a bill, the President shall consult with the Committee on Ways and Means of the House of Representatives, the Committee on Finance of the Senate, and each committee of the House or Senate which has jurisdiction over legislation involving subject matters which would be affected by such amendment, repeal, or enactment. The consultation shall treat all matters relating to the implementation of such requirement, amendment, or recommendation, as provided in paragraphs (2) and (3).

children.heading: Conditions for taking effect under United States law
children.label: 2 Conditions for taking effect under United States law
A
children.text: the President, after consultation with the Congress under paragraph (1), notifies the House of Representatives and the Senate of his determination and publishes notice of that determination in the Federal Register,

children.label: i
children.text: a draft of a bill to amend or repeal provisions of existing statutes or to create statutory authority and an explanation as to how the bill and any proposed administrative action affect existing law, and

children.label: ii
children.text: a statement of how the requirement, amendment, or recommendation serves the interests of United States commerce and why the legislative and administrative action is necessary or appropriate to carry out the requirement, amendment, or recommendation, and

children.label: C
children.text: the bill submitted by the President is enacted into law.

children.heading: Recommendations as to application
children.label: 3 Recommendations as to application
children.text: The President may make the same type of recommendations, in the same manner and subject to the same conditions, to the Congress with respect to the application of any such requirement, amendment, or recommendation as he may make, under , with respect to a trade agreement.section 2112(f) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: the term “trade agreement” shall be treated as a reference to the requirement, amendment, or recommendation, and

children.label: B
children.text: the term “implementing bill” or “implementing revenue bill”, whichever is appropriate, shall be treated as a reference to the bill submitted by the President.

children.heading: Unspecified private remedies not created
children.label: d Unspecified private remedies not created
children.text: Neither the entry into force with respect to the United States of any agreement approved under , nor the enactment of this Act, shall be construed as creating any private right of action or remedy for which provision is not explicitly made under this Act or under the laws of the United States.section 2503(a) of this title
